zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Wycliffe於1498年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維德莫時，她的父親Ralph Wycliffe Esq.33歲，母親Anne Bowes34歲。她於1519年與Thomas Meade V在英國薩默塞特維德莫結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1557年8月28日在英國艾可貝爾登享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Wycliffe于1498年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特維德莫时，她的父亲Ralph Wycliffe Esq.33岁，母亲Anne Bowes34岁。她于1519年与Thomas Meade V在英国薩默塞特維德莫结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1557年8月28日在英国艾可貝爾登享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wycliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wycliffe (NR Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Wycliffe was born in 1498, in Wedmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Wycliffe Esq., was 33 and her mother, Anne Bowes, was 34. She married Thomas Meade V in 1519, in Wedmore, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 28 August 1557, in Berden, Essex, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Wycliffe est née en 1498, à Wedmore, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Wycliffe Esq., avait 33 ans et sa mère, Anne Bowes, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Meade V en 1519, à Wedmore, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 août 1557, à Berden, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Wycliffe 1498 in Wedmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Wycliffe Esq. 33 und ihre Mutter Anne Bowes 34. Sie hat 1519 in Wedmore, Somerset, England Thomas Meade V geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. August 1557 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Berden, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Wycliffe è nata il nel 1498 nel Wedmore, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph Wycliffe Esq., aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Anne Bowes, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Meade V nel 1519, nel Wedmore, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 agosto 1557, nel Berden, Essex, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Wycliffe(이)가 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 w드모어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Wycliffe Esq.(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Bowes(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 서머세트 w드모어에서 Thomas Meade V(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 8월 28일 영국 에세스 버든에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Wycliffe nasceu em 1498, em Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Wycliffe Esq., tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Anne Bowes, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Meade V em 1519, em Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1557, em Berden, Essex, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Wycliffe родилась в 1498 г. в местности ведмор, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Wycliffe Esq. было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Bowes, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Meade V в 1519 г. в местности ведмор, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 28 августа 1557 г. в местности бирден, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Wycliffe nació en 1498, en Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Wycliffe Esq., tenía 33 años y su mamá, Anne Bowes, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Thomas Meade V en 1519, en Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1557, en Berden, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
